metadata.description: Agent Skills for Aomi — open-source AI infrastructure for automating crypto. Drive the Aomi CLI from natural-language prompts (`aomi-transact`) and scaffold new Aomi apps from API specs (`aomi-build`).

plugins.name: aomi-build
plugins.description: Build Aomi apps and plugins from API docs, OpenAPI/Swagger specs, SDK docs, runtime interfaces, and product requirements. Scaffolds Rust SDK crates with lib.rs, client.rs, and tool.rs plus tool schemas, preambles, and host-interop flows.

plugins.name: aomi-transact
plugins.description: Drive the Aomi CLI from natural-language prompts: chat, simulate, and sign with account-abstraction-first execution. Wraps swaps, lending, bridges, staking, perps, and CEX read across 25+ apps on EVM mainnets and L2s.
